article_meta.title: By Jonah Goldberg July 11, 2016 11:14 AM PT Share via Close extra sharing options Email Facebook X LinkedIn Threads Redd

reasoning: Classification (Lean Right) matches the column’s center-right framing and authorial critiques of liberal positions while also critiquing conservatives. However, the response included an invalid code-fence wrapper, slightly overconfident calibration for a nuanced piece, and one key indicator relied on author affiliation rather than authorial prose/structure.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Lean Right is appropriate for the author’s conservative-leaning framing and critiques of liberal approaches, with balanced acknowledgments.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: 0.75 is modestly high for a nuanced, mixed-critique opinion; 0.65–0.7 would better fit the subtle lean.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Most evidence cites the author’s own phrasing and framing, but one indicator (author’s conservative affiliations) is meta and not from the article’s editorial prose/structure.
